data_source: Alpaca real daily OHLCV via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; no --data-csv
decision_rationale: Rejected/parked by high redundancy falsifier: same-date return correlation with turn-month-calendar-window-etf-v1 was 0.969061; main-period Sharpe was only 0.28685493 after costs despite positive median random Sharpe 0.73544359.
divergent_child_idea: Intraday post-macro ETF liquidity vacuum reversal: after large same-day range expansion in SPY/TLT/GLD on scheduled-proxy days, fade the lagging asset next session with volatility-scaled gross and no month-boundary terms.

liquidity-seasonality-balance-window-v1.note: Same AR-042 symbols/prices; only feasible if other model accepts this universe.

turn-month-calendar-window-etf-v1.note: Same AR-042 symbols/prices; only feasible if other model accepts this universe.

yield-credit-stress-etf-allocation-v1.note: Same AR-042 symbols/prices; only feasible if other model accepts this universe.

suggested_next_action: Do not refine AR-042 as implemented; only revisit if a true external event calendar is allowed or a materially orthogonal execution feature is introduced.
warnings: Calendar features are deterministic proxies only; no external event calendar was used.
Backtest uses qfa-compatible next-day close-to-close execution and ex-post 5 bps one-way turnover costs.
High redundancy vs AR-021-style turn-month-calendar-window-etf-v1 (corr 0.969061) means this is not a sufficiently divergent child alpha in current form.
